key_signals: 4h and 1d structure remain supported above 4h VAL 2103.86, 1d TPO POC 2101.41, and 7d AVWAP 2069.02/2068.16
Medium-horizon participation is still positive: 4h futures CVD printed +35591.616, +38337.315, and +13784.695 while 4h whale delta is +7925981.393140003 and 1d whale delta is +147516845.6127901
Immediate upside supply is active near resistance: bearish absorption at 2107.2 and 2114.31, buying exhaustion at 2110.17 and 2110.32, and an ask wall at 2111.98
Execution risk is elevated: VPIN is high/toxic at 0.7268327999999962 and 15m whale flow is sell-dominant at -1339826.30973
flow_context.story: Cross-timeframe flow is bullish but not clean. Structurally, price 2107.19/mark 2107.25 is above 4h price-volume VAL 2103.86, above the 1d TPO POC 2101.41, and well above the 7d AVWAPs at 2069.02 on the 15m/4h view and 2068.16 on the 1d view, so the higher-timeframe auction is still higher. TPO is supportive but capped: the current 1d session has TPO POC 2101.41, VAL 2092.45, VAH 2111.46, and price is above the initial balance high 2095.76; the current 4h session has POC 2104.99, VAL 2104.97, VAH 2106.68, so price is trading above local value but still below the bigger daily value ceiling. CVD is mixed by horizon: the top-level slopes are negative at fut -42.293363070080055 and spot -78.88652318131237, and recent 15m deltas were mixed to weak, but the 4h windows stayed positive on futures at +35591.616000000045, +38337.31500000004, and +13784.695000000023, so medium-horizon demand still dominates. Whale_trades are bearish on the short horizon, with 15m fut_whale_delta_notional -1339826.30973 and 1h -4672738.617280001, but they flip bullish on 4h at +7925981.393140003 and are strongly bullish on 1d at +147516845.6127901 futures plus +1669809.9748 spot. VPIN is high and toxic, not directional: vpin_fut 0.7268327999999962, vpin_spot 0.7038208800000195, toxicity_state high, so continuation trades are lower quality and reversals can be sharp. Absorption is two-sided and only meaningful relative to structure: bullish absorptions at 2104.52, 2101.67, and 2097.91 sit below current price near support, while bearish absorptions at 2107.2 and 2114.31 sit near or above current price near resistance. Exhaustion reads the same way by location: selling exhaustion at 2107.21 and 2106.75 shows sellers tiring around local support/retests, but buying exhaustion at 2110.17 and 2110.32 shows buyers tiring just under the 1d VAH region and the 2111.98 ask wall. Net flow context is therefore bullish on the higher timeframe, but rotational and supply-sensitive on the immediate tape.

stage_1_setup_scan_json.market_narrative: ETHUSDT is in a higher-timeframe bullish recovery, with the 1d and 4h both holding above key value pivots and anchored VWAPs, and with medium-horizon whale/CVD participation still net supportive. The 15m is not in clean trend continuation, though; it is compressing inside an upper intraday bracket after an upside push, with responsive sellers showing at 2107-2114 and confirmed buying exhaustion at 2110.17-2110.32. The dominant context is therefore bullish, but the immediate market state is a pause/consolidation under 2111-2115 resistance rather than open-air breakout.

15m.story: Current futures price is 2107.19 with mark 2107.25. I label the 15m as Sideways because the immediate auction is balancing between support at 2104.82 and resistance at 2111.46 rather than printing clean directional agreement. The structural fields I used were 15m price_volume_structure VAH 2104.82, POC 2103.37, VAL 2102.77; current micro price-volume POC 2106.95 with VAL 2106.3 and VAH 2107.22; and 1d-session TPO VAH 2111.46. Price is above the 15m value area, but it is rotating around the micro POC instead of expanding cleanly away from it. Local flow is conflicted: 15m orderbook OBI is only 0.009478592437442342, essentially flat, while OFI is -52.650999999997566 and spot trade delta is -683.1494000000002; 15m footprint has stacked_buy=true and stacked_sell=true with window_delta +991.4529999999996; 15m whale_trades are sell-dominant with fut_whale_delta_notional -1339826.30973. CVD is mixed rather than trending: the latest 15m delta_fut is +797.0410000000003 but delta_spot is -899.5127000000002, and the two prior 15m bars printed delta_fut -1282.4070000000002 and -3644.951 with delta_spot -1005.7098 and -478.281. I also anchored the absorption and exhaustion signals to structure before interpreting them: bullish absorption printed below price at 2104.52 and 2101.67 near support, while bearish absorption printed at 2107.2 and higher at 2114.31 near the upper edge; selling exhaustion printed at 2107.21, but buying exhaustion printed just above at 2110.17 and 2110.32 under the 2111.46 resistance. Those opposing edge reactions are why I call the 15m sideways. Signals that contradict a sideways label are the broader bullish backdrop: ema_trend_regime 15m is bull, price is +38.17 above the 7d AVWAP 2069.02, and 15m RVWAP is 2104.3098217220036 with z_price_minus_rvwap +2.07. I overrode those because they describe backdrop strength, while the immediate 15m tape is a two-sided consolidation under nearby resistance.

1d.story: I label the 1d as Bullish. I used the 1d TPO POC at 2101.41 as support and the daily price-volume VAH at 2115.21 as resistance because current price 2107.19 is accepted above the daily pivot but is still below the top of daily value. The trend evidence is strong: daily closes stair-stepped higher from 1992.28 on 2026-03-09 to 2035.39, 2050.99, 2072.6, 2091.01, and 2095.27, and the current day is trading 2107.19 with a high of 2116.35. ema_trend_regime_by_tf for 1d is bull, and the higher-timeframe EMAs are far below price, with EMA100 1919.99 and EMA200 1880.89. The 1d AVWAP row is 2068.16, so price is materially above its anchored average, and the 1d RVWAP is 2086.052065958078 with z_price_minus_rvwap +1.41, which keeps price above the mean but not yet beyond the +2 sigma band at 2115.0868431939657. Auction structure also supports the bullish label: 1d TPO POC is 2101.41, TPO VAL 2092.45, TPO VAH 2111.46, and current price is above the initial_balance_high 2095.76; daily price-volume POC is 2096.0 with VAL 2074.69 and VAH 2115.21, so price is trading in the upper half of value. Participation is supportive as well: 1d footprint window_delta is +89357.78499999993 with stacked_buy=true, and 1d whale_trades show fut_whale_delta_notional +147516845.6127901 plus spot_whale_delta_notional +1669809.9748. The main contradiction is that price is still pressing into resistance rather than in clean discovery: daily TPO VAH is 2111.46, daily VAH is 2115.21, and the current high is 2116.35, so overhead supply is nearby. I overrode that because resistance inside upper value does not invalidate the daily uptrend while price remains accepted above 2101.41 and the broader participation profile remains positive.

4h.story: I label the 4h as Bullish because the medium-term structure is rising and participation is net supportive, even though price is not yet through the top of 4h value. I used 4h price-volume VAL 2103.86 as support and VAH 2113.91 as resistance, with 4h POC 2107.0 sitting almost exactly at current price. Trend evidence is straightforward: ema_trend_regime_by_tf for 4h is bull, 4h EMA100 is 2028.17, 4h EMA200 is 2002.87, and price is +38.17 above the 7d AVWAP 2069.02. The last closed 4h candles stair-stepped higher from 2072.65 to 2073.55 to 2076.25 to 2095.27 to 2095.17 to 2104.97, and the current bar is 2107.19, so the recovery sequence is still intact. Participation confirms that move: 4h CVD deltas were +35591.616000000045 at 00:00, +38337.31500000004 at 04:00, and +13784.695000000023 at 08:00 on futures; 4h whale_trades show fut_whale_delta_notional +7925981.393140003 and fut_whale_delta_qty +3765.154999999999; 4h footprint window_delta is +14453.652999999997 with stacked_buy=true. Those all support a bullish label. The contradictory signals are important but not dominant: 4h RVWAP is 2106.980324952442 with z_price_minus_rvwap -0.11, so price is at fair value rather than trending away from it; stacked_sell=true as well; and nearby reversal flow is appearing at the upper edge, with bearish absorption at 2107.2 and 2114.31 plus buying exhaustion at 2110.17 and 2110.32. I overrode those because they argue for resistance and slower upside, not for a bearish 4h trend. As long as price holds above 2103.86 and the 4h CVD/whale participation remains net positive, the 4h trend stays bullish.
